Services

I support organizations that need senior backend execution across architecture, performance, and cloud scale.

1. Architecture Migration (Legacy to FastAPI)

  • Controlled migration plans from legacy systems to modern FastAPI services
  • Domain and contract design for low-risk transition and clean service boundaries
  • Incremental rollout strategies with rollback-safe delivery

2. Backend Performance (Async/SQLAlchemy 2.0)

  • Async request-flow analysis and concurrency optimization
  • SQLAlchemy 2.0 query and data-access refactoring for throughput and clarity
  • Profiling-led remediation plans for measurable latency improvements

3. Scalable Infrastructure (AWS SQS/S3)

  • Queue-first designs with SQS for resilient asynchronous processing
  • S3-centered storage and event patterns for durable workflows
  • Reliability controls for retries, dead-letter handling, and observability

Engagement Standard

All work is anchored in Digital Trust and Code Quality so systems remain dependable, auditable, and maintainable.

Digital Trust & GxP Compliance

Delivery standards centered on reliability, transparency, and quality-minded engineering.
